title: CSS Grid Layout
description: Create a classic blog layout with CSS Grid: header spanning full width, sidebar, main content, and footer
html:
Header
Sidebar
Main Content
Footer

validationRules.message: The layout should use CSS Grid
The header should span all columns
The footer should span all columns

hints.text: CSS Grid is a two-dimensional layout system. Define columns with grid-template-columns and span items with grid-column.
Set 'display: grid' and 'grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr'. Use 'grid-column: 1 / -1' to span full width.
